primerTitle: Econometrics, statistics & time series — how to use it
primer:
## Econometrics, statistics & time series
Interview-screen MCQs on the inferential core of a quant/risk role, **one deck per area**, each card explained.
- **OLS regression** — BLUE, partial effects, R²/adjusted R², t- vs F-tests, log specifications.
- **Regression diagnostics** — heteroskedasticity, autocorrelation, endogeneity, IV/2SLS, robust & HAC errors.
- **Statistics & inference** — Type I/II errors, power, p-values, CIs, CLT/LLN, unbiased vs consistent, the bootstrap.
- **Hypothesis testing** — visual two-bell framework: H₀ vs H₁, α/β tradeoff, power, p-value geometry — interactive slider deck.
- **Panel data & causal inference** — logit/probit, fixed vs random effects, DiD, RDD, IV.
- **Time series — fundamentals** — stationarity, white noise, random walks, ADF/KPSS, ARIMA orders via ACF/PACF.
- **Time series — advanced** — cointegration & ECM, spurious regression, VAR, ARCH/GARCH.

Best drilled in exam mode for fast, accurate recall.
